name: v0.1.0-beta
body:
## Initial Release

### Export

  - Photo export with customizable Polaroid-style border, EXIF overlay, film simulation badge, and color palette swatches
  - Straighten slider (±15°) with Vision-powered auto-level; crops to inscribed rectangle to eliminate transparent corners
  - Text overlays include camera/lens, shot settings, film simulation name, and saved recipe name — each independently toggleable via icon buttons
  with hover tooltips
  - Adaptive single-line and multi-line text layouts; portrait and landscape photos size consistently

###  Recipe Library

  - Recipe fingerprinting identifies a photo's in-camera recipe from EXIF data
  - Canonical recipes — mark reference recipes and detect near-matches (same film sim, ≤2 field deviations) in the gallery
  - Recipe comparison view shows field-level diffs between a photo's recipe and any saved recipe, with color-coded deviations
  - URL import — paste a FujiXWeekly (or similar) blog URL and InkFrame fetches and pre-fills the recipe editor automatically
  - Text import for manually pasted recipe blocks
  - Manual recipe editor with full field support; normalized on save so all ingest paths produce consistent fingerprints
  - Multi-source recipe sync with named sources; "Submit to Community" button for user recipes

###  Sensor Generation Awareness

  - Recipes track target sensor generation (X-Trans II–V, GFX, Bayer)
  - Editor adapts available film simulations and settings per generation (Clarity, Grain, Color Chrome appear only when supported)
  - Sensor auto-detected from EXIF camera model and imported page titles
  - Highlight/Shadow tone dials support 0.5-step increments

###  Gallery & Navigation

  - Streaming folder scan — gallery renders incrementally as photos are discovered
  - Sidebar with collapsible date groups, arrow key navigation, and a "load more" button for large folders
  - Filter pills grouped by semantic recipe identity (exact match, near-match, or film sim) — no duplicate labels
  - Auto-scan recipes on folder open with a cancel button
  - Adaptive detail layout: side-by-side photo + metadata panel at wide widths

###  Performance

  - Thumbnail cache overhaul — fixed memory leak where full-res RAF previews were cached at full size (was quietly consuming 12+ GB); now
  constrained to display size with a 200 MB cost limit
  - Shared CGImageSource reduces file I/O from 3 opens to 1 per photo
  - Persistent disk cache for thumbnails and EXIF data
  - Parallel image loading with direction-aware prefetch capped at 1280px
  - NSCache-backed recipe storage with memory-pressure eviction

###  Polish

  - App icon
  - Blue checkmark seal SF Symbol for canonical recipe badge
  - Color palette extracted once at thumbnail load time (not on every render)
  - Film simulation names normalized across EXIF, blog parser, and on-disk recipes for reliable matching

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/commits/v0.1.0-beta
